metadata.title: You Unveil
metadata.description: Access ancient wisdom through a high-precision celestial engine.

hero.subtitle: Access ancient wisdom through a high-precision celestial engine. Enter your inquiry to begin your journey through the digital arcana.
hero.inputPlaceholder: What does the universe want me to know today?
hero.backgroundAlt: A hyper-detailed celestial background featuring deep navy and charcoal nebulas with shimmering gold star clusters and cosmic dust.
hero.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Try again in a moment.
hero.errorTooLong: That question is too long. Try a shorter version.

wisdom.title: Celestial Wisdom
wisdom.intro: Our digital sage translates the movement of the cosmos into actionable intuition, blending centuries of tradition with tomorrow's intelligence.

sync.title: Hyper-Personalized Sync
sync.body: Readings that evolve with your unique energetic signature, mapping your life events to celestial transits with eerie precision.

spreads.title: Multi-Dimensional Spreads
spreads.body: Dozens of custom spreads designed for everything from complex career shifts to the simple "Daily Vibe" check-in.

journal.title: Ethereal Journaling
journal.body: Archive your readings in a secure, atmospheric space that tracks your spiritual growth and patterns over time.

deck.title: Masterfully Authored Truths
deck.body: Choose from a curated collection of decks, from the traditional Smith-Waite lineage to avant-garde cosmic interpretations. Every card is rendered in stunning high-definition with responsive illumination that reacts to your touch.
deck.card1Alt: A luxury tarot card illustration of 'The Moon' featuring gold leaf detailing on a matte charcoal cardstock.
deck.card2Alt: An intricately designed tarot card of 'The Star' with a high-definition, glowing teal aesthetic.

lunar.title: Lunar Cycle Integration
lunar.body: Readings tuned to the current phase of the moon for maximum resonance.

symbolic.title: Symbolic Synthesis
symbolic.body: Cross-referencing astrology, numerology, and the I-Ching.

elena.quote: The precision is unsettling. You Unveil predicted a major career shift three weeks before it happened, using the 'Cosmic Pivot' spread. It's my morning ritual now.
elena.name: Elena V.
elena.avatarAlt: Professional headshot of a woman in her 30s with a serene expression.

marcus.quote: Finally, a digital oracle that doesn't feel like a toy. The integration with my birth chart transits makes every reading feel deeply specific to my path.
marcus.name: Marcus T.
marcus.avatarAlt: Professional headshot of a man in his late 40s with salt and pepper hair.

sasha.quote: The interface alone is transformative. It creates a space for introspection that I haven't found anywhere else in the digital world. Truly a digital sage.
sasha.name: Sasha K.
sasha.avatarAlt: Portrait of a woman with ethereal makeup and a calm, focused gaze.

cta.title: Ready to Consult the Divine?
cta.body: Join over 50,000 seekers who find clarity in the celestial precision of You Unveil.
